The findings from the automatic essay scoring and instruction-following evaluation domains suggest that practitioners should carefully analyze domain- and rubric-specific performance to move towards higher human-autorater agreement.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，通过提供代表性示例、增加上下文和减少位置偏差等量规修改可以提高人工评分者与自动评分者（LLM作为评判者）之间的一致性，而量规复杂化和保守聚合方法会降低一致性。
AI.motivation: 随着自动评分者(LLM-as-judges)在评估和内容审核中的广泛应用，需要理解量规修改如何影响人工评分者与自动评分者之间的一致性。整体性评估由于复杂性和主观性可能产生解释不一致，而分析性评估虽然能改善个体准确性，但可能导致评分间的不一致。
AI.method: 研究比较了整体性评估（如作文质量）和分析性评估（如将质量分解为流畅性和组织性）两种量规设计。通过编辑量规内容、添加示例和上下文、减少位置偏差等方式，分析这些修改对人工-自动评分者一致性的影响。
AI.result: 提供代表性示例和额外上下文的量规编辑提高了人工-自动评分者一致性；减少量规中的位置偏见也具有积极作用。相反，量规复杂度增加和保守的聚合方法会降低一致性。
AI.conclusion: 在设计和部署可靠的自动评分系统时，从业者应仔细分析特定领域和量规的性能表现，通过优化量规设计来提高人工与自动化评分之间的一致性。

title: Unifying Scientific Communication: Fine-Grained Correspondence Across Scientific Media
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: The communication of scientific knowledge has become increasingly multimodal, spanning text, visuals, and speech through materials such as research papers, slides, and recorded presentations. These different representations collectively convey a study's reasoning, results, and insights, offering complementary perspectives that enrich understanding. However, despite their shared purpose, such materials are rarely connected in a structured way. The absence of explicit links across formats makes it difficult to trace how concepts, visuals, and explanations correspond, limiting unified exploration and analysis of research content. To address this gap, we introduce the Multimodal Conference Dataset (MCD), the first benchmark that integrates research papers, presentation videos, explanatory videos, and slides from the same works. We evaluate a range of embedding-based and vision-language models to assess their ability to discover fine-grained cross-format correspondences, establishing the first systematic benchmark for this task. Our results show that vision-language models are robust but struggle with fine-grained alignment, while embedding-based models capture text-visual correspondences well but equations and symbolic content form distinct clusters in the embedding space. These findings highlight both the strengths and limitations of current approaches and point to key directions for future research in multimodal scientific understanding. To ensure reproducibility, we release the resources for MCD at https://github.com/meghamariamkm2002/MCD

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了多模态会议数据集(MCD)，这是首个整合来自同一研究工作的论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片的数据集，并系统评估了多种模型在跨模态细粒度对齐任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 科学知识传播日益多模态化，涵盖文本、视觉和语音等多种形式，但这些材料之间缺乏结构化连接，使得难以追踪概念、视觉和解释之间的对应关系，限制了对研究内容的统一探索和分析。
AI.method: 构建了多模态会议数据集(MCD)，整合研究论文、演示视频、讲解视频和幻灯片；评估了基于嵌入的模型和视觉语言模型在发现细粒度跨格式对应关系方面的能力，建立了该任务的系统性基准。
AI.result: 视觉语言模型稳健但难以处理细粒度对齐；基于嵌入的模型能很好地捕捉文本-视觉对应关系，但公式和符号内容在嵌入空间中形成独立簇；揭示了当前方法的优势和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果指出了多模态科学理解的关键方向，为未来研究提供了重要参考；通过开源数据集和资源促进了该领域的可重现性研究。

title: LatentRAG: Latent Reasoning and Retrieval for Efficient Agentic RAG
summary: Single-step retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) provides an efficient way to incorporate external information for simple question answering tasks but struggles with complex questions. Agentic RAG extends this paradigm by replacing single-step retrieval with a multi-step process, in which the large language model (LLM) acts as a search agent that generates intermediate thoughts and subqueries to iteratively interact with the retrieval system. This iterative process incurs substantial latency due to the autoregressive generation of lengthy thoughts and subqueries. To address this limitation, we propose LatentRAG, a novel framework that shifts both reasoning and retrieval from discrete language space to continuous latent space. Unlike existing explicit methods that generate natural language thoughts or subqueries token-by-token, LatentRAG produces latent tokens for thoughts and subqueries directly from the hidden states in a single forward pass. We align LLMs with dense retrieval models in the latent space, enabling retrieval over latent subquery tokens and supporting end-to-end joint optimization. To improve transparency and encourage semantically meaningful latent representations, we incorporate a parallel latent decoding mechanism that translates latent tokens back into natural language. Extensive experiments on seven benchmark datasets show that LatentRAG achieves performance comparable to explicit agentic RAG methods while reducing inference latency by approximately 90%, substantially narrowing the latency gap with traditional single-step RAG.

AI.tldr: LatentRAG是一个通过将显式语言空间转换为连续潜在空间来加速Agent化RAG的新框架，在保持相当性能的同时将推理延迟降低约90%。
AI.motivation: 现有Agent化RAG通过多步检索和显式语言生成处理复杂问题，但由于需要逐个token生成冗长的思维和子查询，导致推理延迟严重，限制了其在实时场景中的应用。
AI.method: LatentRAG将推理和检索从离散语言空间转移到连续潜在空间，通过单次前向传播直接从隐藏状态生成潜在token表示的思维和子查询，在潜在空间中对齐大语言模型和密集检索模型，并加入并行潜在解码机制提高可解释性。
AI.result: 在七个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，LatentRAG实现了与显式Agent化RAG方法相当的性能，同时将推理延迟降低约90%，显著缩小了与传统单步RAG的延迟差距。
AI.conclusion: LatentRAG通过潜在空间表示和优化有效解决了Agent化RAG的延迟问题，为复杂问答任务提供了高效解决方案，实现了高性能与低延迟的平衡。

title: VideoRouter: Query-Adaptive Dual Routing for Efficient Long-Video Understanding
summary: Video large multimodal models increasingly face a scalability bottleneck: long videos produce excessively long visual-token sequences, which sharply increase memory and latency during inference. While existing compression methods are effective in specific settings, most are either weakly query-aware or apply a fixed compression policy across frames, proving suboptimal when visual evidence is unevenly distributed over time. To address this, we present VideoRouter, a query-adaptive dual-router framework built on InternVL for budgeted evidence allocation. The Semantic Router predicts the dominant allocation policy, choosing between broad temporal coverage and adaptive high-resolution preservation, while the Image Router uses early LLM layers to score frame relevance. This enables aggressive compression on less relevant frames while preserving detail on critical evidence frames. To train both routers, we build Video-QTR-10K for allocation-policy supervision and Video-FLR-200K for frame-relevance supervision. Experiments on VideoMME, MLVU, and LongVideoBench show that VideoRouter consistently improves over the InternVL baseline under comparable or lower budgets, achieving up to a 67.9% token reduction.

AI.tldr: VideoRouter是一个基于InternVL的查询自适应双路由框架，通过语义路由和图像路由实现预算有限的证据分配，在长视频处理中最多可减少67.9%的视觉token
AI.motivation: 长视频大模型面临可扩展性瓶颈：长视频产生过长的视觉token序列，导致推理时内存和延迟急剧增加。现有压缩方法要么查询感知度弱，要么在所有帧上应用固定压缩策略，当视觉证据在时间上分布不均时效果次优
AI.method: VideoRouter采用双路由架构：语义路由器预测主导分配策略，选择广时域覆盖或自适应高分辨率保存；图像路由器使用早期LLM层对帧相关性评分。构建了Video-QTR-10K数据集用于分配策略监督，Video-FLR-200K数据集用于帧相关性监督
AI.result: 在VideoMME、MLVU和LongVideoBench测试中，VideoRouter在可比或更低预算下始终优于InternVL基线，实现了高达67.9%的token减少
AI.conclusion: VideoRouter通过查询自适应的双路由机制有效解决了长视频处理中的性能瓶颈，实现了智能的视觉token压缩，在保持或提升模型性能的同时显著降低了计算资源消耗

title: Log-Likelihood, Simpson's Paradox, and the Detection of Machine-Generated Text
summary: The ability to reliably distinguish human-written text from that generated by large language models is of profound societal importance. The dominant approach to this problem exploits the likelihood hypothesis: that machine-generated text should appear more probable to a detector language model than human-written text. However, we demonstrate that the token-level signal distinguishing human and machine text is non-uniform across the hidden space of the detector model, and naively averaging likelihood-based token scores across regions with fundamentally different statistical structure, as most detectors do, causes a form of Simpson's paradox: a strong local signal is destroyed by inappropriate aggregation. To correct for this, we introduce a learned local calibration step grounded in Bayesian decision theory. Rather than aggregating raw token scores, we first learn lightweight predictors of the score distributions conditioned on position in hidden space, and aggregate calibrated log-likelihood ratios instead. This single intervention dramatically and consistently improves detection performance across all baseline detectors and all datasets we consider. For example, our calibrated variant of Fast-DetectGPT improves AUROC from $0.63$ to $0.85$ on GPT-5.4 text, and a locally-calibrated DMAP detector we introduce achieves state-of-the-art performance across the board. That said, our central contribution is not a new detector, but a precise diagnosis of a significant cause of under-performance of existing detectors and a principled, modular remedy compatible with any token-averaging pipeline. This will serve as a foundation for the community to build upon, with natural avenues including richer distributional models, improved calibration strategies, and principled ensembling with hidden-space geometry signals via the full Bayes-optimal decision rule.

AI.tldr: 本文发现现有AI文本检测器存在辛普森悖论问题，提出基于贝叶斯决策理论的局部校准方法，显著提升了检测性能。
AI.motivation: 准确区分人类编写文本和大型语言模型生成的文本对社会至关重要。现有主流检测方法基于似然假设，但由于检测器隐藏空间中的信号不均匀性，简单的平均聚合会破坏强烈的局部信号。
AI.method: 提出一种基于贝叶斯决策理论的学习型局部校准方法，不再直接聚合原始token分数，而是先学习隐藏空间位置条件下的分数分布预测器，然后聚合校准后的对数似然比。
AI.result: 该方法显著改善了所有基线检测器和数据集的性能。校准版Fast-DetectGPT在GPT-5.4文本上的AUROC从0.63提升至0.85，新提出的局部校准DMAP检测器在各项指标上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心价值在于精确诊断了现有检测器性能不足的重要原因，并提供了一个可兼容任何token平均流程的模块化解决方案，为后续研究提供了基础，可进一步扩展至更丰富的分布模型、改进的校准策略和集成方法。

title: Align3D-AD: Cross-Modal Feature Alignment and Dual-Prompt Learning for Zero-shot 3D Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-shot 3D anomaly detection aims to identify anomalies without access to training data from target categories. However, existing methods mainly rely on projecting 3D observations into multi-view representations that primarily capture geometric cues rather than realistic visual semantics and process them with vision encoders pretrained on RGB data, leading to a significant domain gap between the encoder and the projected representations. To address this issue, we propose Align3D-AD, a unified two-stage framework that leverages the RGB modality from auxiliary categories as cross-modal guidance for zero-shot 3D anomaly detection. First, we introduce a cross-modal feature alignment paradigm that maps rendering features into the RGB semantic space. Unlike prior works that implicitly rely on pretrained encoders, our method enables direct semantic transfer from RGB observations. A semantic consistency reweighting strategy is further introduced to refine feature alignment by reweighting local regions according to holistic semantic consistency. Second, we propose a modality-aware prompt learning framework with dual-prompt contrastive alignment. By assigning independent prompts to RGB-aligned and rendering features, our method captures complementary semantics across modalities, while the contrastive alignment further enhances prompt representations to improve discriminability. Extensive experiments on MVTec3D-AD, Eyecandies, and Real3D-AD demonstrate that Align3D-AD consistently outperforms existing zero-shot methods under both one-vs-rest and cross-dataset settings, highlighting its generalization capability and robustness. Code and the dataset will be made available once our paper is accepted.

AI.tldr: Align3D-AD是一种零样本3D异常检测框架，通过利用RGB模态作为跨模态指导，解决了现有方法中渲染特征与RGB预训练编码器之间的领域鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的零样本3D异常检测方法主要依赖将3D观测投影到多视图表示，这些表示主要捕获几何线索而非真实视觉语义，并且使用在RGB数据上预训练的视觉编码器处理，导致编码器与投影表示之间存在显著的领域鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出了统一的两阶段框架Align3D-AD：1) 跨模态特征对齐范式，将渲染特征映射到RGB语义空间，实现从RGB观测的直接语义转移；2) 采用语义一致性重加权策略优化特征对齐；3) 提出模态感知的提示学习框架，通过双提示对比对齐捕获跨模态互补语义。
AI.result: 在MVTec3D-AD、Eyecandies和Real3D-AD数据集上的广泛实验表明，Align3D-AD在一对多和跨数据集设置下均一致优于现有的零样本方法，展现了出色的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Align3D-AD通过创新的跨模态对齐和提示学习机制，有效解决了零样本3D异常检测中的领域鸿沟问题，为该领域提供了新的解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: MultiLinguahah : A New Unsupervised Multilingual Acoustic Laughter Segmentation Method
summary: Laughter is a social non-vocalization that is universal across cultures and languages, and is crucial for human communication, including social bonding and communication signaling. However, detecting laughter in audio is a challenging task, and segmenting is even more difficult. Currently, Machine Learning methods generally rely on costly manual annotation, and their datasets are mostly based on English contexts. Thus, we propose an unsupervised multilingual method that sets up the laughter segmentation task as an anomaly detection of energy-based segmented audio sequences. Our method applies an Isolation Forest on audio representations learned from BYOL-A encoder. We compare our method with several state-of-the-art laughter detection algorithms on four datasets, including stand-up comedy, sitcoms, and general short audio from AudioSet. Our results show that state-of-the-art methods are not optimized for multilingual contexts, while our method outperforms them in non-English settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于异常检测的无监督多语言笑声分割方法，使用BYOL-A音频编码器和Isolation Forest算法，在非英语环境中表现优于现有的监督学习方法。
AI.motivation: 当前笑声检测方法存在两个主要问题：1）依赖昂贵的手工标注数据，2）数据集主要基于英语语境，缺乏多语言支持。这限制了方法在实际多元文化环境中的应用。
AI.method: 将笑声分割任务建模为基于音频序列能量的异常检测问题，采用BYOL-A自监督学习音频表示，再使用Isolation Forest算法进行无监督的异常检测来实现笑声分割。
AI.result: 在四个数据集（包括脱口秀、情景喜剧和AudioSet短音频）上的实验表明，现有最先进方法在多语言环境中效果不佳，而所提方法在非英语设置下性能更优。
AI.conclusion: 这种无监督多语言方法有效解决了传统监督学习方法对标注数据的依赖和语言局限性问题，为跨文化笑声检测提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: InkDiffuser: High-Fidelity One-shot Chinese Calligraphy via Differentiable Morphological Optimization
summary: Current Chinese calligraphy generation methods suffer from poor stroke rendering and unrealistic ink morphology, resulting in outputs with limited visual fidelity and artistic fluidity. To address this problem, we propose \textbf{InkDiffuser}, a diffusion-based generative framework for one-shot Chinese calligraphy synthesis. To guarantee high-fidelity rendering, we introduce two core contributions: a high-frequency enhancement mechanism and a Differentiable Ink Structure (DIS) loss that explicitly regularizes ink morphology. Inspired by the observation that high-frequency information in individual samples typically carries contour details, we enhance content extraction by explicitly fusing high-frequency representations for more accurate font structure. Furthermore, we propose a differentiable ink structure loss that integrates differentiable morphological operations into the diffusion process. By allowing the model to learn an explicit decomposition of ink-trace structures, DIS facilitates fine-grained refinement of stroke contours and delivers significantly improved visual realism in the generated calligraphy. Extensive experiments on various calligraphic styles and complex characters demonstrate that InkDiffuser can generate superior calligraphy fonts with realistic ink rendering effects from only a single reference glyph and outperform existing few-shot font generation approaches in structural consistency, detail fidelity, and visual authenticity. The code is available at the following address: https://github.com/JingVIPLab/InkDiffuser.

AI.tldr: InkDiffuser是一个基于扩散模型的中文书法生成框架，通过高频增强机制和可微分墨迹结构损失来提升渲染质量和艺术流畅性。
AI.motivation: 现有中文书法生成方法存在笔画渲染质量差、墨迹形态不真实的问题，导致生成结果的视觉保真度和艺术流畅性有限。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散的生成框架InkDiffuser，包含两个核心贡献：1) 高频增强机制，通过融合高频表示来增强字体结构提取的准确性；2) 可微分墨迹结构(DIS)损失，将可微分形态学操作集成到扩散过程中，让模型学习墨迹结构的显式分解。
AI.result: 在多种书法风格和复杂字符上的大量实验表明，InkDiffuser仅需单个参考字形就能生成具有逼真墨迹渲染效果的优质书法字体，在结构一致性、细节保真度和视觉真实性方面优于现有的少数字体生成方法。
AI.conclusion: InkDiffuser通过高频增强和可微分墨迹结构损失的创新设计，有效解决了中文书法生成中的渲染质量和形态真实性问题，为高质量的书法字体生成提供了新的解决方案。

title: Who and What? Using Linguistic Features and Annotator Characteristics to Analyze Annotation Variation
summary: Human label variation has been established as a central phenomenon in NLP: the perspectives different annotators have on the same item need to be embraced. Data collection practices thus shifted towards increasing the annotator numbers and releasing disaggregated datasets, harmful language being most resourced due to its high subjectivity. While this resulted in rich information about \textit{who} annotated (sociodemographics, attitudes, etc.), the \textit{what} (e.g., linguistic properties of items), and their interplay has received little attention. We present the first large-scale analysis of four reference datasets for harmful language detection, bringing together annotator characteristics, linguistic properties of the items, and their interactions in a statistically informed picture. We find that interactions are crucial, revealing intersectional effects ignored in previous work, and that a strong role is played by lexical cues and annotator attitudes. Effect patterns, however, vary considerably across datasets. This urges caution about generalization and transferability.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对有害语言检测的四个参考数据集进行了大规模分析，结合标注者特征、项目语言学特征及其交互作用，发现交互效应和交叉性影响被此前工作忽视，且词汇线索和标注者态度起关键作用，但效应模式在不同数据集间差异显著。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类标注差异已被确立为自然语言处理中的核心现象，导致标注实践向增加标注者数量和发布 disaggregated 数据集转变，但关于标注者特征、项目语言学特征及其相互作用的分析较少，而有害语言检测因其高度主观性成为最资源丰富的领域，亟需系统性理解。
AI.method: 采用大规模统计分析方法研究四个有害语言检测参考数据集，整合标注者特征（社会人口统计、态度等）、项目的语言学特征及其交互作用。
AI.result: 发现交互效应至关重要，揭示了被先前研究忽略的交叉性影响；词汇线索和标注者态度扮演重要角色；但效应模式在不同数据集间存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 该研究强调在进行有害语言检测时需要谨慎对待泛化和可迁移性原则，因为交互效应和交叉性因素以及数据集差异都表明不能简单地将发现推广到其他场景。

title: Training-Free Dense Hand Contact Estimation with Multi-Modal Large Language Models
summary: Dense hand contact estimation requires both high-level semantic understanding and fine-grained geometric reasoning of human interaction to accurately localize contact regions. Recently, multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in understanding visual semantics, enabled by vision-language priors learned from large-scale data. However, leveraging MLLMs for dense hand contact estimation remains underexplored. There are two major challenges in applying MLLMs to dense hand contact estimation. First, encoding explicit 3D hand geometry is difficult, as MLLMs primarily operate on vision and language modalities. Second, capturing fine-grained vertex-level contact remains challenging, as MLLMs tend to focus on high-level semantics rather than detailed geometric reasoning. To address these challenges, we propose ContactPrompt, a training-free and zero-shot approach for dense hand contact estimation using MLLMs. To effectively encode 3D hand geometry, we introduce a detailed hand-part segmentation and a part-wise vertex-grid representation that provides structured, localized geometric information. To enable accurate and efficient dense contact prediction, we develop a multi-stage structured contact reasoning with part conditioning, progressively bridging global semantics and fine-grained geometry. Therefore, our method effectively leverages the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs while enabling precise dense hand contact estimation. Surprisingly, the proposed approach outperforms previous supervised methods trained on large-scale dense contact datasets without requiring any training. The codes will be released.

AI.tldr: ContactPrompt是一种基于多模态大语言模型的训练无关、零样本密集手部接触估计方法，无需训练即超越现有监督方法。
AI.motivation: 密集手部接触估计需要高层语义理解和细粒度几何推理，而现有MLLMs在3D手部几何编码和顶点级接触捕捉方面存在挑战，影响其在此任务的直接应用。
AI.method: 提出详细手部部件分割和基于部件的顶点网格表示来编码3D手部几何；开发多阶段结构化接触推理与部件调节机制，逐步连接全局语义与细粒度几何。
AI.result: 该方法无需任何训练，在密集手部接触估计任务上性能超越之前在大规模密集接触数据集上训练的监督方法。
AI.conclusion: ContactPrompt成功将MLLMs的推理能力应用于密集手部接触估计，通过创新的几何表示和推理机制，实现了训练无关的高性能解决方案。

title: Teaching Thinking Models to Reason with Tools: A Full-Pipeline Recipe for Tool-Integrated Reasoning
summary: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) offers a direct way to extend thinking models beyond the limits of text-only reasoning. Paradoxically, we observe that tool-enabled evaluation can degrade reasoning performance even when the strong thinking models make almost no actual tool calls. In this paper, we investigate how to inject natural tool-use behavior into a strong thinking model without sacrificing its no-tool reasoning ability, and present a comprehensive TIR recipe. We highlight that (i) the effectiveness of TIR supervised fine-tuning (SFT) hinges on the learnability of teacher trajectories, which should prioritize problems inherently suited for tool-augmented solutions; (ii) controlling the proportion of tool-use trajectories could mitigate the catastrophic forgetting of text-only reasoning capacity; (iii) optimizing for pass@k and response length instead of training loss could maximize TIR SFT gains while preserving headroom for reinforcement learning (RL) exploration; (iv) a stable RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) stage, built upon suitable SFT initialization and explicit safeguards against mode collapse, provides a simple yet remarkably effective solution. When applied to Qwen3 thinking models at 4B and 30B scales, our recipe yields models that achieve state-of-the-art performance in a wide range of benchmarks among open-source models, such as 96.7% and 99.2% on AIME 2025 for 4B and 30B, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套完整的工具集成推理(TIR)方法，通过优化监督微调数据选择、比例控制和强化学习策略，使思维模型在获得强大工具使用能力的同时不损失原有推理能力，在数学推理基准测试中达到开源模型最优水平。
AI.motivation: 工具集成推理虽然可以扩展思维模型能力，但观察到即使模型很少实际调用工具，启用工具评估仍会降低推理性能。如何在工具使用和纯文本推理之间取得平衡是关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出一套综合TIR方法：(1)监督微调选择适合工具解决的易学习教师轨迹；(2)控制工具使用轨迹比例防止文本推理能力遗忘；(3)优化pass@k和响应长度而非训练损失；(4)基于合适SFT初始化和防模式崩溃的稳定强化学习阶段(RLVR)。
AI.result: 在Qwen3思维模型(4B和30B)上应用该方法，在AIME 2025上分别达到96.7%和99.2%，在多个基准测试中实现了开源模型的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了工具增强与纯文本推理的权衡问题，为思维模型的工具集成提供了有效路径，显著提升了模型在需要外部工具的任务上的表现。

title: DBMSolver: A Training-free Diffusion Bridge Sampler for High-Quality Image-to-Image Translation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Includes supplementary material
summary: Diffusion-based image-to-image (I2I) translation excels in high-fidelity generation but suffers from slow sampling in state-of-the-art Diffusion Bridge Models (DBMs), often requiring dozens of function evaluations (NFEs). We introduce DBMSolver, a training-free sampler that exploits the semi-linear structure of DBM's underlying SDE and ODE via exponential integrators, yielding highly-efficient 1st- and 2nd-order solutions. This reduces NFEs by up to 5x while boosting quality (e.g., FID drops 53% on DIODE at 20 NFEs vs. 2nd-order baseline). Experiments on inpainting, stylization, and semantics-to-image tasks across resolutions up to 256x256 show DBMSolver sets new SOTA efficiency-quality tradeoffs, enabling real-world applicability. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/snumprlab/dbmsolver.

AI.tldr: DBMSolver是一种免训练的采样器，利用指数积分器优化扩散桥模型，将函数评估次数减少5倍，同时提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 基于扩散的图像到图像转换技术在高质量生成方面表现优异，但最先进的扩散桥模型采样速度缓慢，通常需要数十次函数评估，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出了DBMSolver，一种训练自由的采样器，通过指数积分器方法利用DBM底层随机微分方程和常微分方程的半线性结构，实现了高效的一阶和二阶求解方案。
AI.result: 在DIODE数据集上，20 NFEs时FID比二阶基线降低53%；在256x256分辨率的修复、风格化和语义到图像任务上，建立了新的效率-质量权衡基准。
AI.conclusion: DBMSolver显著提升了扩散桥模型的采样效率和质量权衡，使基于扩散的I2I转换技术在现实应用中更加可行，为高保真图像生成提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: Measuring Evaluation-Context Divergence in Open-Weight LLMs: A Paired-Prompt Protocol with Pilot Evidence of Alignment-Pipeline-Specific Heterogeneity
summary:
Safety benchmarks are routinely treated as evidence about how a language model will behave once deployed, but this inference is fragile if behavior depends on whether a prompt looks like an evaluation. We define evaluation-context divergence as an observable within-item change in behavior induced by framing a fixed task as an evaluation, a live deployment interaction, or a neutral request, and present a paired-prompt protocol that measures it in open-weight LLMs while controlling for paraphrase variation, benchmark familiarity, and judge framing-sensitivity.
  Across five instruction-tuned checkpoints from four open-weight families plus a matched OLMo-3 base/instruct ablation ($20$ paired items, $840$ generations per checkpoint), we find striking heterogeneity. OLMo-3-Instruct alone is eval-cautious -- evaluation framing raises refusal vs. neutral by $11.8$pp ($p=0.007$) and reduces harmful compliance vs. deployment by $3.6$pp ($p=0.024$, $0/20$ items inverted) -- while Mistral-Small-3.2, Phi-3.5-mini, and Llama-3.1-8B are deployment-cautious}, with marginal eval-vs-deployment refusal effects of $-9$ to $-20$pp. The matched OLMo-3 base also exhibits the deployment-cautious pattern, identifying alignment as the inversion stage; within Llama-3.1, the $70$B model preserves direction with attenuated magnitude, ruling out a simple ``small-model effect that reverses at scale.'' One caveat: the cross-family heterogeneity is judge-dependent. Re-judging with a different-family safety classifier (Llama-Guard-3-8B) preserves the within-OLMo eval-cautious direction but flattens the cross-family contrast, indicating that the two judges operationalize distinct constructs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现不同语言模型在评估环境和部署环境中的安全行为存在显著差异，这种'评估-环境差异'因模型而异，且结果受评估标准影响。
AI.motivation: 安全基准测试通常被视为模型部署后行为的证据，但如果模型行为依赖于提示是否看起来像评估，这种推断就不可靠。研究者意识到需要系统测量模型在不同情境框架下的行为差异。
AI.method: 提出了配对提示协议来测量评估-环境差异，通过将固定任务框架化为评估、实时部署交互或中性请求，控制了释义变化、基准熟悉度和评判者框架敏感性等因素。测试了5个指令调优检查点和基础模型对比。
AI.result: OLMo-3-Instruct表现出评估谨慎性（拒绝率增加11.8pp），而其他模型如Mistral、Phi-3.5和Llama-3.1则表现部署谨慎性。对齐过程是行为反转的关键阶段，而非简单的模型规模效应。跨家族异质性依赖于评判标准。
AI.conclusion: 模型的安全行为高度依赖于任务框架，这种依赖性在不同模型家族间差异显著。安全评估结果的解释需要谨慎考虑评判标准的影响，单一基准测试可能不足以预测部署后的行为。

title: MTL-MAD: Multi-Task Learners are Effective Medical Anomaly Detectors
summary: Anomaly detection in medical images is a challenging task, since anomalies are not typically available during training. Recent methods leverage a single pretext task coupled with a large-scale pre-trained model to reach state-of-the-art performance. Instead, we propose to learn multiple self-supervised and pseudo-labeling tasks from scratch, using a joint model based on Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). By carefully integrating multiple proxy tasks, the joint model effectively learns a robust representation of normal anatomical structures, so that anomaly scores can be derived based on how well the multi-task learner (MTL) solves each task during inference. We perform comprehensive experiments on BMAD, a recent benchmark that comprises a broad range of medical image modalities. The empirical results indicate that our multi-task learner is an effective anomaly detector, outperforming all state-of-the-art competitors on BMAD. Moreover, our model produces interpretable anomaly maps, potentially helping physicians in providing more accurate diagnoses.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于多任务学习和混合专家模型(MoE)的医学图像异常检测方法，通过从头学习多个自监督和伪标签任务，在BMAD基准测试上超越了所有现有方法。
AI.motivation: 医学图像异常检测具有挑战性，因为训练时通常无法获取异常样本。现有方法依赖单一前置任务和大规模预训练模型，存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出基于混合专家模型(MoE)的联合模型，从头学习多个自监督和伪标签代理任务，通过精心集成多任务来学习正常解剖结构的鲁棒表示，并根据推理时多任务学习者的表现推导异常分数。
AI.result: 在涵盖多种医学图像模态的BMAD基准测试上进行全面实验，结果表明该方法优于所有最先进的竞争对手，并能生成可解释的异常图。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习者是一种有效的异常检测器，不仅性能优越，还能生成可解释的异常图，有潜力帮助医生提供更准确的诊断。

title: MANTRA: Synthesizing SMT-Validated Compliance Benchmarks for Tool-Using LLM Agents
summary: Tool-using large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in settings where their reliable behavior is governed by strict procedural manuals. Ensuring that such agents comply with the rules from these manuals is challenging, as they are typically written for humans in natural language while agent behavior manifests as an execution trace of tool calls. Existing evaluations of LLM agents rely on manually constructed benchmarks or LLM-based judges, which either do not scale or lack reliability for complex, long-horizon manuals. To overcome these limitations, we present MANTRA, a framework for automatically synthesizing machine-checkable compliance benchmarks from natural-language manuals and tool schemas. MANTRA independently generates (i) a symbolic world model capturing procedural dependencies, and (ii) a set of trace-level compliance checks for a given task, and validates their consistency using SMT solving. A structured repair loop resolves inconsistencies, requiring human intervention only as a fallback. %This yields benchmarks that are formally validated. Importantly, MANTRA supports arbitrary domains and long procedural manuals, and provides a tunable notion of task complexity which is utilized to automatically derive challenging tasks accompanying compliance checks. Using MANTRA, we build a new benchmark suite with 285 tasks across 6 domains scaling to 50+ page manuals with minimal human effort. Empirically, we show that the compliance checks are richer with stronger constraint enforcement compared to existing benchmarks. Additionally, the granularity of the checks can be used for debugging the agents' failure modes. These results demonstrate that combining automated benchmark generation with formally grounded validation methods enables scalable and reliable benchmarking of tool-using agents.

AI.tldr: MANTRA是一个自动化框架，能够从自然语言操作手册合成机器可检查的合规性基准，用于评估工具使用型LLM代理的行为合规性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理评估方法要么依赖手动构建的基准（缺乏可扩展性），要么使用LLM作为评判者（对复杂长篇手册缺乏可靠性），无法有效确保代理在遵循严格程序手册方面的行为合规性。
AI.method: MANTRA框架独立生成符号世界模型（捕获程序依赖关系）和追踪级合规检查集，使用SMT求解验证一致性，通过结构化修复循环解决不一致性，并自动生成具有挑战性的任务。
AI.result: 构建了包含285个任务、6个领域、50+页手册的新基准套件，生成的合规检查比现有基准更丰富且约束更强，可用于调试代理失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 将自动化基准生成与形式化验证方法相结合，实现了工具使用代理的可扩展且可靠的基准测试，为复杂手册下的代理合规性评估提供了有效解决方案。

title: Detecting AI-Generated Videos with Spiking Neural Networks
summary: Modern AI-generated videos are photorealistic at the single-frame level, leaving inter-frame dynamics as the main remaining axis for detection. Existing detectors typically handle this temporal evidence in three ways: feeding the full frame sequence to a generic temporal backbone, reducing one dominant temporal cue to fixed video-level descriptors, or comparing temporal features to real-video statistics through a detection metric. These strategies degrade sharply under cross-generator evaluation, where artifact type and timescale vary across generators. On caption-paired benchmark, GenVidBench, we identify two signatures that prior detectors do not jointly exploit: AI-generated videos exhibit smoother frame-to-frame temporal residuals at the pixel level, and more compact trajectories in the semantic feature space, indicating a temporal smoothness gap at both levels. We further observe that, when raw video is fed into a Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), fake clips elicit firing predominantly at object and motion boundaries, unlike real clips, suggesting that the SNN responds to temporal artifacts localized at edges. These cues are sparse, asynchronous, and concentrated at moments of change, which makes SNNs a natural choice for this task: their event-driven, sparsely-activated dynamics align with the structure of the residual signal in a way that dense ANN backbones do not. Building on this observation, we propose MAST, a detector that processes multi-channel temporal residuals with a spike-driven temporal branch alongside a frozen semantic encoder for cross-generator generalization. On the GenVideo benchmark, MAST achieves 93.14\% mean accuracy across 10 unseen generators under strict cross-generator evaluation, matching or surpassing the strongest ANN-based detectors and demonstrating the practical applicability of SNNs to AI-generated video detection.

AI.tldr: MAST检测器利用SNNs处理多通道时间残差特征，在跨生成器AI视频检测中实现93.14%准确率，证明脉冲神经网络在AI生成视频检测中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI视频检测器在跨生成器评估中性能急剧下降，因为不同生成器的伪影类型和时间尺度差异很大，需要更鲁棒的检测方法。
AI.method: 通过SNNs处理时间残差信号，结合冻结的语义编码器，利用AI视频在像素级更平滑的时间残差和语义空间更紧凑轨迹特征，构建MAST检测器。
AI.result: 在GenVideo基准测试中，MAST在10个未见生成器的严格跨生成器评估下达到93.14%平均准确率，匹配或超越最强的基于ANN的检测器。
AI.conclusion: SNNs的事件驱动、稀疏激活特性与AI生成视频时间残差信号的结构天然匹配，为跨生成器AI视频检测提供了有效解决方案。

title: Don't Lose Focus: Activation Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections
summary: Activation steering controls LLM behaviour towards target behaviour by intervening in internal representations, yet it often degrades reasoning and retrieval performance. We argue that a primary cause of this trade-off is attention rerouting: steering vectors alter query-key matching, shifting attention away from contextually important tokens toward less informative ones. To address this, we propose Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections (SKOP), a steering method that constrains harmful attention rerouting without eliminating steering efficacy. SKOP achieves this by preserving attention patterns on a small set of focus tokens the model relies on for reasoning and retrieval, while allowing redistribution among less critical tail tokens. Across multiple steering benchmarks, we show that SKOP achieves the best joint steering-utility trade-off, reducing utility degradation by 5-7x while retaining over 95% of vanilla steering efficacy. Our results further suggest that, in long-context retrieval settings where vanilla steering approaches are ineffective, SKOP can maintain robust performance by avoiding attention rerouting.

AI.tldr: SKOP是一种新的激活转向方法，通过约束有害的注意重新路由来减少性能损失，实现更好的转向-效用平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的激活转向方法在控制大语言模型行为的同时，往往会导致推理和检索性能下降，主要原因是转向向量改变了查询-键匹配，导致注意力从重要的上下文标记转移到信息量较少的标记上。
AI.method: 提出Steering via Key-Orthogonal Projections (SKOP)方法，通过保护模型依赖的少量关键标记的注意力模式，同时允许在不太关键的尾部标记之间重新分配注意力，从而约束有害的注意力重新路由。
AI.result: 在多个转向基准测试中，SKOP实现了最佳的转向-效用平衡，将效用损失降低了5-7倍，同时保持了超过95%的标准转向效果。在长上下文检索场景中，当标准转向方法失效时，SKOP仍能保持强大性能。
AI.conclusion: SKOP方法成功解决了激活转向中的注意力重新路由问题，为在保持模型推理和检索能力的同时控制LLM行为提供了有效解决方案。

title: Understanding Cross-Language Transfer Improvements in Low-Resource HTR: The Role of Sequence Modeling
summary: Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for Arabic-script languages benefits from cross-language joint training under low-resource conditions, particularly when using CRNN-based models that combine convolutional encoders with sequence modeling. However, it remains unclear whether these improvements are better explained by shared visual representations or sequence-level dependencies. In this work, we conduct a controlled architectural study of line-level Arabic-script HTR, comparing CNN-only models with CTC decoding and CRNN models under identical single-script and multi-script training regimes. Experiments are performed on Arabic (KHATT), Urdu (NUST-UHWR), and Persian (PHTD) datasets under low-resource settings (K in {100, 500, 1000}). Our results show a clear divergence in transfer behavior: while CNN-only models exhibit limited or unstable improvements, CRNN models achieve better performance under multi-script training, particularly in the most data-constrained regimes. Focusing on transfer improvements (delta CER) rather than absolute performance, we find that cross-language improvements are associated with sequence-level modeling, while sharing visual representations learned by the CNN encoder, corresponding to similarities in character shapes across scripts, alone appears to be insufficient. This finding suggests that contextual modeling plays an important role in enabling effective transfer in low-resource scenarios, and that similar behavior may extend to other low-resource language settings.

AI.tldr: 该研究发现，阿拉伯文字手写文本识别的跨语言改进主要来源于序列级建模而非视觉特征共享。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯文字手写识别在低资源条件下通过跨语言联合训练获得改进，但不清楚这种改进是源于共享的视觉表示还是序列级依赖关系。
AI.method: 在阿拉伯语、乌尔都语和波斯语数据集上进行对照实验，比较纯CNN-CTC模型和CRNN模型在单脚本和多脚本训练下的表现，使用100-1000个样本的低资源设置。
AI.result: CRNN模型在多脚本训练下表现更好，特别是在数据最受限的情况下；纯CNN模型改进有限或不稳定。跨语言改进与序列级建模而非视觉特征共享相关。
AI.conclusion: 在低资源场景中，上下文建模对于实现有效的跨语言转移起着关键作用，这一发现可能适用于其他低资源语言环境。

title: SEQUOR: A Multi-Turn Benchmark for Realistic Constraint Following
summary: In a conversation, a helpful assistant must reliably follow user directives, even as they refine, modify, or contradict earlier requests. Yet most instruction-following benchmarks focus on single-turn or short multi-turn scenarios, leaving open how well models handle long-horizon instruction-following tasks. To bridge this gap, we present SEQUOR, an automatic benchmark for evaluating constraint adherence in long multi-turn conversations. SEQUOR consists of simulated persona-driven interactions built with constraints extracted from real-world conversations. Our results show that even when following a single constraint, instruction-following accuracy consistently decreases as the conversation grows longer, with drops exceeding 11%. This decline becomes larger when models have to follow multiple constraints simultaneously, reducing their accuracy by over 40%. In scenarios where constraints are added or replaced at arbitrary points of the conversation, model accuracy decreases by more than 9%. Taken together, our results reveal that current models still struggle to follow user instructions in multi-turn conversations, and provide a way for better measuring instruction-following capabilities in assistants.

AI.tldr: SEQUOR是一个自动基准测试，用于评估模型在长多轮对话中遵循约束的能力。研究发现，随着对话增长，模型遵循指令的准确性显著下降，尤其在多约束和约束变更情况下。
AI.motivation: 现有的指令遵循基准主要关注单轮或短多轮场景，缺乏对长对话轮次中指令遵循能力的评估，而实际对话助手需要能够处理持续更新的用户指令。
AI.method: 构建了SEQUOR基准测试，使用从真实对话中提取的约束来模拟角色驱动的交互，并评估模型在长多轮对话中的约束遵循表现。
AI.result: 模型在遵循单个约束时，准确性随对话长度增加而下降超过11%；遵循多个约束时准确性下降超过40%；约束添加或替换场景下准确性下降超过9%。
AI.conclusion: 当前大型语言模型在长多轮对话环境下的指令遵循能力仍然有限，SEQUOR为更好地评估助手系统的指令遵循能力提供了有效方法。

title: Architecture-agnostic Lipschitz-constant Bayesian header and its application to resolve semantically proximal classification errors with vision transformers
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables; Supplementary 5 pages with 5 figures; Including references total 18 pages
summary: Label noise remains a critical bottleneck for the generalization of supervised deep learning models, particularly when errors are structured rather than random. Standard robust training methods often fail in the presence of such semantically proximal classification errors. This work presents an architecture-agnostic Lipschitz-constant Bayesian header that can be integrated into feature extractors such as vision transformers, yielding the bi-Lipschitz-constrained Bayesian Vision Transformer (LipB-ViT). In contrast to conventional Bayesian layers, our approach enforces spectral normalization on both the mean and log-variance of the variational weights, which promotes calibrated predictive uncertainty and mitigates noise amplification. We further propose a novel metric to jointly capture uncertainty and confidence across misclassification rates, as well as an adaptive arithmetic-mean fusion scheme that combines feature-space proximity with predictive uncertainty to detect corrupted labels outperforming the state of the art k-nearest neighbor based identification methods by more than 7% reaching a recall of more than 0.93 at 15% semantically misclassified labels. Although computational costs increase due to Monte Carlo sampling, the method offers plug-and-play compatibility with pre-trained backbones and consistent hyperparameters across domains, suggesting strong utility for high-stakes applications with variable annotation reliability. The stabilized confidence estimates serve as the foundation for an analysis pipeline that jointly assesses dataset quality and label noise, yielding a second novel metric for their combined quantification. Lastly, we systematically evaluate LipB-ViT under both structured (adversarial) and unstructured noise at inference time, demonstrating its robustness in realistic high-noise and attack scenarios. We compare its performance against baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种与架构无关的Lipschitz常数贝叶斯头部(LipB-ViT)，通过谱正则化和不确定性融合来处理结构化标签噪声，在视觉变换器上实现了显著的鲁棒性和标签检测性能提升。
AI.motivation: 监督深度学习模型在处理结构化而非随机的标签噪声时泛化能力差，现有的鲁棒训练方法在语义相近的分类错误面前往往失效，这成为模型实用化的关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 开发了LipB-ViT方法，其核心是对贝叶斯层的均值和方差均施加谱归一化约束，提出联合不确定性和置信度评估指标，以及基于特征空间邻近性和预测不确定性的自适应算术平均融合方案。
AI.result: 在15%语义错误标签下，标签检测召回率达到93%以上，比最先进的k近邻方法提升超过7%；在结构化和非结构化噪声场景下均展现出优异的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法具有即插即用特性，可与预训练主干网络集成，跨领域使用统一超参数，为高重要性应用中的数据集质量和标签噪声联合评估提供了新的分析工具。

title: GATHER: Convergence-Centric Hyper-Entity Retrieval for Zero-Shot Cell-Type Annotation
summary: Zero-shot single-cell cell-type annotation aims to determine a cell's type from a given set of expressed genes without any training. Existing knowledge-graph-based RAG approaches retrieve evidence by expanding from source entities and relying on iterative LLM reasoning. However, in this setting each query contains tens to hundreds of genes, where no single gene is decisive and the label emerges only from their collective co-occurrence. Such hyper-entity queries fundamentally challenge local, entity-wise exploration strategies, which reason from individual genes, leading to poor scalability and substantial LLM cost. We propose GATHER (Graph-Aware Traversal with Hyper-Entity Retrieval), a convergence-centric retriever tailored to hyper-entity queries. It performs global multi-source graph traversal and identifies topological convergence points -- nodes jointly reachable from many input genes. These convergence nodes act as high-information hyper-entities that capture entity synergy. By incorporating node- and path-importance scoring, GATHER selects informative evidence entirely without LLM involvement during retrieval. Instantiated on a self-constructed cell-centric biological knowledge graph (VCKG), GATHER outperforms strong KG-RAG baselines (ToG, ToG-2, RoG, PoG) on two datasets (Immune and Lung), achieving the highest exact-match accuracy (27.45% and 59.64%) with only a single LLM call per sample, compared to 2--61 calls for KG-RAG baselines. Our results demonstrate that convergence nodes compress multi-entity signals into compact, high-information evidence that conveys more per item than multi-hop paths, providing an efficient global alternative to local entity-wise reasoning.

AI.tldr: GATHER是一种图感知的超实体检索方法，用于零单细胞类型注释，通过拓扑收敛点捕获多基因协同信号，仅需单次LLM调用即超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 零样本单细胞类型注释中，查询包含数十到数百个基因，没有单个基因具有决定性，标签仅从它们的集体共现中产生。基于知识图谱的RAG方法从个体基因进行局部实体级探索，导致扩展性差和LLM成本高。
AI.method: 提出GATHER方法，执行全局多源图遍历，识别拓扑收敛点——可从多个输入基因共同到达的节点。通过节点和路径重要性评分选择信息性证据，检索过程完全无需LLM参与。
AI.result: 在自构建的细胞中心生物知识图谱(VCKG)上，GATHER在Immune和Lung数据集上超越了ToG、ToG-2、RoG、PoG等基线，分别达到27.45%和59.64%的精确匹配准确率，每个样本仅需1次LLM调用，而基线需要2-61次调用。
AI.conclusion: 收敛节点将多实体信号压缩为紧凑、高信息量的证据，比多跳路径传递更多信息，为局部实体级推理提供了高效的全局替代方案。

title: Plug-and-play Class-aware Knowledge Injection for Prompt Learning with Visual-Language Model
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision
summary: Prompt learning has become an effective and widely used technique in enhancing vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP for various downstream tasks, particularly in zero-shot classification within specific domains. Existing methods typically focus on either learning class-shared prompts for a given domain or generating instance-specific prompts through conditional prompt learning. While these methods have achieved promising performance, they often overlook class-specific knowledge in prompt design, leading to suboptimal outcomes. The underlying reasons are: 1) class-specific prompts offer more fine-grained supervision compared to coarse class-shared prompts, which helps prevent misclassification of data from different classes into a single class; 2) compared to class-specific prompts, instance-specific prompts neglect the richer class-level information across multiple instances, potentially causing data from the same class to be divided into multiple classes. To effectively supplement the class-specific knowledge into existing methods, we propose a plug-and-play Class-Aware Knowledge Injection (CAKI) framework. CAKI comprises two key components, i.e., class-specific prompt generation and query-key prompt matching. The former encodes class-specific knowledge into prompts from few-shot samples that belong to the same class and stores the learned prompts in a class-level knowledge bank. The latter provides a plug-and-play mechanism for each test instance to retrieve relevant class-level knowledge from the knowledge bank and inject such knowledge to refine model predictions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our CAKI effectively improves the performance of existing methods on base and novel classes. Code is publicly available at \href{https://github.com/yjh576/CAKI}{this https URL}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CAKI框架，通过类感知知识注入机制，为现有提示学习方法补充类别特定知识，显著提升了视觉语言模型在零样本分类任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法存在局限性：类别共享提示过于粗糙容易导致误分类，实例特定提示忽略了跨多个实例的丰富类别信息，可能将同类数据分割成多个类别。
AI.method: CAKI框架包含两个关键组件：1) 类别特定提示生成器，从少量同类样本中编码类别知识并存储在知识库中；2) 查询-键提示匹配机制，为测试实例检索相关类别知识并注入以优化预测。
AI.result: 在基础类别和新颖类别上的大量实验证明，CAKI能有效提升现有方法的性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CAKI作为一个即插即用的框架，成功解决了现有提示学习方法忽视类别特定知识的问题，为视觉语言模型的提示学习提供了新的解决思路。

title: MiA-Signature: Approximating Global Activation for Long-Context Understanding
comment: This is a work in progress; we will continue to revise and improve the manuscript
summary: A growing body of work in cognitive science suggests that reportable conscious access is associated with \emph{global ignition} over distributed memory systems, while such activation is only partially accessible as individuals cannot directly access or enumerate all activated contents. This tension suggests a plausible mechanism that cognition may rely on a compact representation that approximates the global influence of activation on downstream processing. Inspired by this idea, we introduce the concept of \textbf{Mindscape Activation Signature (MiA-Signature)}, a compressed representation of the global activation pattern induced by a query. In LLM systems, this is instantiated via submodular-based selection of high-level concepts that cover the activated context space, optionally refined through lightweight iterative updates using working memory. The resulting MiA-Signature serves as a conditioning signal that approximates the effect of the full activation state while remaining computationally tractable. Integrating MiA-Signatures into both RAG and agentic systems yields consistent performance gains across multiple long-context understanding tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了心智景观激活签名(MiA-Signature)概念，通过压缩的全局激活模式表示来近似激活对下游处理的影响，在LLM系统中实现了性能提升。
AI.motivation: 认知科学研究表明，可报告的意识访问与分布式记忆系统的全局激活相关，但个体无法直接访问或枚举所有激活内容，这种张力表明认知可能依赖于一种紧凑表示来近似激活的全局影响。
AI.method: 受认知科学启发，引入MiA-Signature作为查询引发的全局激活模式的压缩表示。在LLM系统中，通过基于子模块的高层概念选择来实现，覆盖激活语境空间，可选择通过工作记忆的轻量级迭代更新进行细化。
AI.result: 将MiA-Signature集成到RAG和代理系统中，在多个长语境理解任务上取得了持续的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: MiA-Signature作为一种有效的压缩表示机制，能够近似完整激活状态的效果同时保持计算可行性，为大语言模型的长语境理解提供了新的解决方案。

title: Think, then Score: Decoupled Reasoning and Scoring for Video Reward Modeling
summary: Recent advances in generative video models are increasingly driven by post-training and test-time scaling, both of which critically depend on the quality of video reward models (RMs). An ideal reward model should predict accurate rewards that align with human preferences across diverse scenarios. However, existing paradigms face a fundamental dilemma: \textit{Discriminative RMs} regress rewards directly on features extracted by multimodal large language models (MLLMs) without explicit reasoning, making them prone to shortcut learning and heavily reliant on massive data scaling for generalization. In contrast, \textit{Generative RMs} with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning exhibit superior interpretability and generalization potential, as they leverage fine-grained semantic supervision to internalize the rationales behind human preferences. However, they suffer from inherent optimization bottlenecks due to the coupling of reasoning and scoring within a single autoregressive inference chain. To harness the generalization benefits of CoT reasoning while mitigating the training instability of coupled reasoning and scoring, we introduce DeScore, a training-efficient and generalizable video reward model. DeScore employs a decoupled ``think-then-score'' paradigm: an MLLM first generates an explicit CoT, followed by a dedicated discriminative scoring module consisting of a learnable query token and a regression head that predicts the final reward. DeScore is optimized via a two-stage framework: (1) a discriminative cold start incorporating a random mask mechanism to ensure robust scoring capabilities, and (2) a dual-objective reinforcement learning stage that independently refines CoT reasoning quality and calibrates the final reward, ensuring that higher-quality reasoning directly translates to superior model performance.

AI.tldr: DeScore是一种新型视频奖励模型，采用'思考-打分'解耦范式，结合生成式推理和判别式打分的优势，提高训练效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频奖励模型存在根本困境：判别式RM缺乏显式推理容易走捷径，生成式RM虽然推理能力强但训练不稳定，两者都无法满足视频生成模型的post-training和test-time scaling对高质量奖励模型的需求。
AI.method: DeScore采用解耦的'think-then-score'范式，第一阶段MLLM生成显式CoT，第二阶段专用判别式打分模块(包含可学习query token和回归头)预测最终奖励。通过两阶段优化：1) 判别式冷启动确保打分能力；2) 双目标强化学习独立优化推理质量和奖励校准。
AI.result: DeScore成功结合了CoT推理的泛化优势和判别式打分的稳定性，通过解耦设计克服了现有方法的训练困难，实现了训练高效且泛化能力强的视频奖励模型。
AI.conclusion: DeScore为视频奖励模型提供了一种新的解决方案，通过推理与打分的解耦设计，既保持了生成式模型的推理可视化优势，又避免了其训练不稳定的缺点，为视频生成模型的进一步发展奠定基础。

title: From 124 Million Tokens to 1,021 Neologisms: A Large-Scale Pipeline for Automatic Neologism Detection
comment: 14 pages, 5 tables. Accepted at NeoLLM 2026 Workshop, co-located with LREC-COLING 2026
summary: We present a scalable, modular pipeline for automatic neologism detection that combines rule-based filtering with LLM classification. The pipeline is grounded in two complementary word-formation frameworks, grammatical and extra-grammatical morphology, which jointly define the scope of what counts as a neologism and inform a four-class classification scheme (neologism, entity, foreign, none). While designed to be modular and transferable at the architectural level, the pipeline is instantiated on 527 million English-language Reddit posts spanning 2005-2024. From this corpus, we extract 124.6 million unique tokens and reduce them by over 99.99% to yield 1,021 neologism candidates, a set small enough for manual expert verification. Multiple LLMs independently classify each candidate via majority vote, with a final verification step, revealing substantial cross-model disagreement and highlighting the challenge of operationalizing neologism detection at scale. Manual annotation of all 1,021 candidates confirms that 599 (58.7%) are genuine lexical innovations. The pipeline code, vocabulary compilation scripts, and the annotated candidate list are available at https://github.com/DiegoRossini/neologism-pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个结合规则过滤和LLM分类的可扩展新词检测流水线，通过处理5.27亿条Reddit帖子，最终识别出599个真实的新词汇。
AI.motivation: 面对海量社交媒体数据，传统新词检测方法难以有效扩展。需要开发一个可扩展、模块化的自动化流水线，能够大规模识别新词汇并保持准确性。
AI.method: 基于语法和超语素构词框架构建四类分类体系（新词、实体、外来词、无），采用规则过滤筛选候选词，多LLM投票分类，最后人工验证确认。
AI.result: 从原始语料中提取出1.246亿个独特词元，缩减99.99%得到1021个候选新词，最终确认599个（58.7%）为真实新词，发现了显著的LLM分类差异。
AI.conclusion: 该流水线成功实现了大规模新词检测，代码和标注数据公开可用，同时揭示了跨模型一致性问题，为新词检测研究提供了重要工具和见解。

title: Backdoor Mitigation in Object Detection via Adversarial Fine-Tuning
summary: Backdoor attacks can implant malicious behaviours into deep models while preserving performance on clean data, posing a serious threat to safety-critical vision systems. Although backdoor mitigation has been studied extensively for image classification, defenses for object detection remain comparatively underdeveloped. Adversarial fine-tuning is a common backdoor mitigation approach in classification, but adapting it to detection is nontrivial as classification-oriented adversarial generation does not match the detection attack space, where attacks may cause object misclassification or disappearance, and standard detection losses can dilute the repair signal across many predictions. We address these challenges through a detection-aware adversarial fine-tuning framework for mitigating object-detection backdoors when the defender has access only to a compromised detector and a small clean dataset, without knowing the attack objective. For adversarial generation that does not require knowledge of the attack objective, we introduce soft-branch minimisation, which uses a soft gate to combine objectives aligned with misclassification and disappearance attacks, together with a detection-aware classification-loss maximisation. For targeted repair, we introduce a dual-objective fine-tuning loss applied to target-matched predictions, concentrating the defensive update on predictions most relevant to the backdoor behaviour. Experiments across CNN- and Transformer-based detectors show that our approach more effectively reduces attack success while preserving true detections, compared with classification-oriented baselines, and maintains competitive clean detection performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对目标检测后门攻击的防御框架，通过检测感知的对抗微调方法，在无需知道攻击目标的情况下，有效降低攻击成功率同时保持检测性能。
AI.motivation: 目标检测系统的后门攻击威胁严重，但现有防御技术主要集中在图像分类领域，目标检测的后门防御相对不成熟。传统的对抗微调方法难以直接应用于目标检测，因为分类导向的对抗生成不匹配检测攻击空间，且标准检测损失会在多个预测中稀释修复信号。
AI.method: 提出了检测感知的对抗微调框架，包含两个关键技术：1) 软分支最小化方法，使用软门结合与误分类和消失攻击对齐的目标，以及检测感知的分类损失最大化；2) 双目标微调损失，仅应用于目标匹配的预测，集中防御更新在与后门行为最相关的预测上。
AI.result: 在CNN和Transformer检测器上的实验表明，相比分类导向的基线方法，所提方法能更有效降低攻击成功率，同时保持真实检测，并维持了有竞争力的清洁检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了目标检测后门防御的关键挑战，为在实际场景中保护安全关键的视觉系统提供了有效的解决方案，特别适用于防御者仅可获得被妥协检测器和小规模清洁数据集的情况。

title: COVID-19 Infodemic. Understanding content features in detecting fake news using a machine learning approach
summary: The use of content features, particularly textual and linguistic for fake news detection is under-researched, despite empirical evidence showing the features could contribute to differentiating real and fake news. To this end, this study investigates a selection of content features such as word bigrams, part of speech distribution etc. to improve fake news detection. We performed a series of experiments on a new dataset gathered during the COVID-19 pandemic and using Decision Tree, K-Nearest Neighbor, Logistic Regression, Support Vector Machine and Random Forest. Random Forest yielded the best results, followed closely by Support Vector Machine, across all setups. In general, both the textual and linguistic features were found to improve fake news detection when used separately, however, combining them into a single model did not improve the detection significantly. Differences were also noted between the use of bigrams and part of speech tags. The study shows that textual and linguistic features can be used successfully in detecting fake news using the traditional machine learning approach as opposed to deep learning.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了文本和语言学内容特征在COVID-19假新闻检测中的应用，发现传统机器学习方法（特别是随机森林）能有效利用这些特征检测假新闻，但特征的组合使用并未显著提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管有实证证据表明文本和语言学特征有助于区分真假新闻，但基于内容特征的假新闻检测研究相对不足，因此本研究旨在探索这些特征的有效性。
AI.method: 研究收集了COVID-19大流行期间的新数据集，使用词组二元语法、词性分布等文本和语言学特征，并通过决策树、K近邻、逻辑回归、支持向量机和随机森林等传统机器学习算法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 随机森林表现最佳，支持向量机紧随其后；文本和语言学特征单独使用时均能提升检测效果，但将它们组合成单一模型并未显著改善检测性能；二元语法和词性标签的使用效果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，即使在深度学习盛行的时代，传统机器学习方法仍然能够有效利用文本和语言学特征进行假新闻检测，这为假新闻检测提供了新的思路和实用价值。

title: Whole-body CT attenuation and volume charts from routine clinical scans via evidence-grounded LLM report filtering
summary: Interpreting quantitative CT biomarkers, such as organ volume and tissue attenuation, requires large-scale healthy reference distributions. However, creating these is challenging because clinical datasets are often heavily enriched with pathology. Here, we develop an evidence-grounded, cross-verified large language model (LLM) ensemble to filter pathological findings from radiology reports, enabling the construction of pathology-reduced cohorts from over 350,000 CT examinations. Five LLMs, first, flag structure-level abnormality candidates grounded in verbatim report evidence and, second, resolve disagreements via cross-verification. Using distribution-aware generalized additive models for location, scale, and shape, we establish comprehensive whole-body reference charts for 106 anatomical structures (volumes and attenuation) across adulthood, accounting for age, sex, contrast enhancement, and acquisition parameters. Longitudinal analyses reveal structure- and contrast-dependent changes distinct from cross-sectional trends. These resources facilitate covariate-adjusted centile scoring from routine CT, supporting standardized quantitative phenotyping, multi-site imaging studies, and scalable opportunistic screening research.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发基于证据的大型语言模型集成系统，从35万份CT检查中过滤病理报告，构建了106个全身解剖结构的参考分布图表。
AI.motivation: 临床数据集通常富含病理病例，难以建立大规模健康参考分布来解释定量CT生物标志器（如器官体积和组织衰减）。
AI.method: 设计基于证据的跨验证LLM集成系统：首先5个LLM基于报告原文标记结构级异常候选，然后通过交叉验证解决分歧。使用分布感知的广义加性模型建立考虑年龄、性别、对比增强和采集参数的参考图表。
AI.result: 成功构建了涵盖成年的106个解剖结构综合全身参考图表，纵向分析揭示了结构和对比依赖性变化，与横断面趋势不同。
AI.conclusion: 该资源支持从常规CT进行协变量调整百分位评分，促进标准化定量表型分析、多中心影像研究和可扩展的机会性筛查研究。

title: Towards Emotion Consistency Analysis of Large Language Models in Emotional Conversational Contexts
summary: In this work, we conduct an analysis to examine the consistency of Large Language Models (LLMs) with respect to their own generated responses in an emotionally-driven conversational context. Specifically, the text generated by LLM is framed as a query to the same model, and its responses are subsequently assessed. This is performed with three queries across two dimensions of extreme and moderate emotions. The three queries are, in particular, false claim queries that contain inherently wrong assumptions (false presuppositions) in increasing order of intensity. Two commercial models, Claude-3.5-haiku, GPT4o-mini, and a medium-sized model, Mistral-7B, are considered in the study. Our findings indicate that LLMs exhibit below-average performance and remain vulnerable to false beliefs embedded within queries. This susceptibility is especially pronounced for moderate emotional content. Furthermore, an extended attention-score-based analysis highlights a shift in models' priority from evaluative to generative. The results raise important considerations for LLMs' deployment in high-stakes, emotionally sensitive contexts.

AI.tldr: 研究分析了三种LLM在情感驱动对话中的自洽性，发现模型对包含错误前提的查询表现不佳，尤其在中等情感语境下更容易受到错误信念影响，注意力机制分析显示模型从评估转向生成模式。
AI.motivation: 为了评估大语言模型在情感敏感对话场景下的可靠性，特别是在面对包含错误预设的查询时是否能够保持一致性和准确性，这对于模型在高风险应用中的部署至关重要。
AI.method: 将LLM生成的文本作为查询重新输入同一模型，通过三种不同强度的错误声明查询（中等和极端情感两个维度）来测试Claude-3.5-haiku、GPT4o-mini和Mistral-7B三个模型的一致性表现，并基于注意力分数进行扩展分析。
AI.result: LLMs表现低于平均水平，容易受到查询中嵌入的错误信念影响，这种脆弱性在中等情感内容中尤为明显。注意力分析显示模型的优先级从评估转向生成，可能导致对错误前提的识别能力下降。
AI.conclusion: 研究发现揭示了LLMs在情感敏感环境中存在的潜在风险，强调了在部署这些模型到高 stakes 场景前需要加强其一致性和错误检测能力，特别是在处理中等情感内容的查询时。

title: RAWild: Sensor-Agnostic RAW Object Detection via Physics-Guided Curve and Grid Modeling
summary: Camera sensor RAW data offers intrinsic advantages for object detection, including deeper bit depth, preserved physical information, and freedom from image signal processor (ISP) distortions. However, varying exposure conditions, spectral sensitivities, and bit depths across devices introduce substantially larger domain gaps than sRGB, making sensor-agnostic generalization a fundamental challenge. In this study, we present \textbf{RAWild}, a physics-guided global-local tone mapping framework for sensor-agnostic RAW object detection. By factoring sensor-induced variations into a global tonal correction and a spatially adaptive local color adjustment, both driven by RAW distribution priors, our framework enables a single network to train jointly across heterogeneous sensors. To further support cross-sensor generalization, we construct a physics-based RAW simulation pipeline that synthesizes realistic sensor outputs spanning diverse spectral sensitivities, illuminants, and sensor non-idealities. Extensive experiments across multiple RAW benchmarks covering bit depths from 10 to 24 demonstrate state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance under single-dataset, mixed-dataset, and challenging robustness settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RAWild框架，通过物理引导的全局-局部色调映射和跨传感器RAW模拟管道，实现了传感器无关的RAW目标检测。
AI.motivation: 相机传感器RAW数据虽然在目标检测中具有深度位深、保留物理信息和避免ISP失真等优势，但不同设备间的曝光条件、光谱灵敏度和位深变化导致域差异远大于sRGB，使得传感器无关的泛化成为根本性挑战。
AI.method: 提出了RAWild物理引导全局-局部色调映射框架，将传感器引起的变异分解为基于RAW分布先验驱动的全局色调校正和空间自适应局部颜色调整。同时构建了基于物理的RAW模拟管道，合成涵盖多种光谱灵敏度、光源和传感器非理想性的真实传感器输出，支持跨传感器训练和泛化。
AI.result: 在多个覆盖10-24位深的RAW基准测试上的广泛实验表明，所提方法在单数据集、混合数据集和具有挑战性的鲁棒性设置下均达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: RAWild框架通过物理驱动的色调映射和跨传感器数据合成，有效解决了RAW目标检测中传感器无关泛化这一核心问题，为RAW级别的目标检测提供了新的解决方案。

title: Litespark Inference on Consumer CPUs: Custom SIMD Kernels for Ternary Neural Networks
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed artificial intelligence, but their computational requirements remain prohibitive for most users. Standard inference demands expensive datacenter GPUs or cloud API access, leaving over one billion personal computers underutilized for AI workloads. Ternary models offer a path forward: their weights are constrained to {-1, 0, +1}, theoretically eliminating the need for floating-point multiplication. However, existing frameworks fail to exploit this structure, treating ternary models as dense floating-point networks. We address this gap with custom SIMD kernels that replace matrix multiplication with simple addition and subtraction operations, targeting the integer dot product instructions available on modern CPUs. Our implementation, Litespark-Inference, is pip-installable and integrates directly with Hugging-Face, achieving 9.2x faster time-to-first-token, 52x higher throughput, and 14x memory reduction compared to standard PyTorch inference on Apple Silicon, with similar speedups on Intel and AMD processors.

AI.tldr: Litespark-Inference是一个利用SIMD内核优化三值大语言模型推理的框架，通过整数加减运算替代浮点乘法，在主流CPU上实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM推理对计算资源要求过高，大量个人计算机CPU资源未被充分利用。虽然三值模型理论上可消除浮点运算，但现有框架未能充分利用这一优势。
AI.method: 开发定制SIMD内核，将矩阵乘法转换为简单的加减运算，利用现代CPU的整数点积指令，并创建可pip安装的框架Litespark-Inference，直接集成Hugging-Face。
AI.result: 在Apple Silicon上相比标准PyTorch推理实现了9.2倍的提速、52倍的吞吐量提升和14倍的内存节约，在Intel和AMD处理器上也获得类似加速效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过充分利用三值模型的数值特性和现代CPU硬件能力，Litespark-Inference成功在个人计算机上实现了高效的LLM推理，大幅降低了AI应用的计算门槛。

title: MobileEgo Anywhere: Open Infrastructure for long horizon egocentric data on commodity hardware
summary: The recent advancement of Vision Language Action (VLA) models has driven a critical demand for large scale egocentric datasets. However, existing datasets are often limited by short episode durations, typically spanning only a few minutes, which fails to capture the long horizon temporal dependencies necessary for complex robotic task execution. To bridge this gap, we present MobileEgo Anywhere, a framework designed to facilitate the collection of robust, hour plus egocentric trajectories using commodity mobile hardware. We leverage the ubiquitous sensor suites of modern smartphones to provide high fidelity, long term camera pose tracking, effectively removing the high hardware barriers associated with traditional robotics data collection. Our contributions are three fold: (1) we release a novel dataset comprising 200 hours of diverse, long form egocentric data with persistent state tracking; (2) we open source a mobile application that enables any user to record egocentric data, and (3) we provide a comprehensive processing pipeline to convert raw mobile captures into standardized, training ready formats for Vision Language Action model and foundation model research. By democratizing the data collection process, this work enables the massive scale acquisition of long horizon data across varied global environments, accelerating the development of generalizable robotic policies.

AI.tldr: MobileEgo Anywhere是一个使用智能手机收集大规模、长时间视动轨迹的框架，包含200小时数据集、开源应用和标准化处理管道，旨在降低机器人数据收集门槛并加速VLA模型发展。
AI.motivation: 现有视动数据集存在时序短（仅几分钟）的局限性，无法满足复杂机器人任务对长期时间依赖性的需求，且传统机器人数据收集硬件成本高昂。
AI.method: 利用现代智能手机的通用传感器套件实现高精度、长期相机姿态追踪，开发了移动应用让任何用户都能记录视动数据，并提供数据处理管道将原始数据转换为标准化训练格式。
AI.result: 发布了200小时多样化长时间视动数据集，开源了移动应用和完整处理管道，实现了低成本、大规模数据收集。
AI.conclusion: 通过民主化数据收集过程，该工作能够在全球各种环境中大规模获取长期数据，加速通用机器人策略的开发，为Vision Language Action模型研究提供重要基础设施支持。

title: The Frequency Confound in Language-Model Surprisal and Metaphor Novelty
comment: to be presented and published at the 15th Joint Conference on Lexical and Computational Semantics (*SEM 2026)
summary: Language-model (LM) surprisal is widely used as a proxy for contextual predictability and has been reported to correlate with metaphor novelty judgments. However, surprisal is tightly intertwined with lexical frequency. We explore this interaction on metaphor novelty ratings using two different word frequency measures. We analyse surprisal estimates from eight Pythia model sizes and 154 training checkpoints. Across settings, word frequency is a stronger predictor of metaphor novelty than surprisal. Across training stages, the surprisal--novelty association peaks at an early stage and then falls again, mirroring a similarly timed increase in the surprisal--frequency association. These results suggest that the often-reported optimal LM surprisal settings may incorrectly associate contextual predictability with metaphor novelty and processing difficulty, whereas lexical frequency may be the major underlying factor.

AI.tldr: 研究发现词汇频率比语言模型意外值更能预测隐喻新颖性，传统认为的LM意外值与隐喻加工难度的关联可能源于混淆了词汇频率因素。
AI.motivation: 语言模型意外值被广泛用作语境可预测性的代理指标，并被报道与隐喻新颖性判断相关，但意外值与词汇频率紧密关联，需要澄清这种交互作用。
AI.method: 使用两种词汇频率测量方法，分析8个Pythia模型规模和154个训练检查点的意外值估计，考察意外值、频率与隐喻新颖性的关系。
AI.result: 词汇频率始终是比意外值更强的隐喻新颖性预测指标；意外值与新穎性的关联在训练早期达到峰值然后下降，与意外值-频率关联增长的时间模式相呼应。
AI.conclusion: 以往报道的最优语言模型意外值设置可能错误地将语境可预测性与隐喻新颖性及加工难度关联起来，词汇频率才是主要影响因素。

title: Prompt-Free and Efficient SAM2 Adaptation for Biomedical Semantic Segmentation via Dual Adapters
summary: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM2) demonstrated impressive zero-shot capabilities on natural images but faces challenges in biomedical segmentation due to significant domain shifts and prompt dependency. To address these limitations, we propose a prompt-free, parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework designed for multi-class segmentation on variable-sized inputs. We introduce a convolutional Positional Encoding Generator to adapt effectively to arbitrary aspect ratios and present a dual-adapter strategy: High-Performance Adapter utilizing deformable convolutions for precise boundary modeling and Lightweight Adapter employing structural re-parameterization to minimize inference latency. Experiments on ISBI 2012, Kvasir-SEG, Synapse, and ACDC datasets demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms strong adaptation baselines. Specifically, our method improved segmentation accuracy by up to 19.66\% over the vanilla SAM2, while reducing computational costs by approximately 87\% compared to heavyweight medical SAM adaptations, establishing a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种免提示、参数高效的SAM2微调框架，通过位置编码生成器和双适配器策略，显著提升了生物医学图像分割的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: SAM2在自然图像上表现出色但在生物医学分割中面临领域差异和提示依赖的挑战，需要一种无需提示且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 引入卷积位置编码生成器适应任意宽高比，采用双适配器策略：高性能适配器使用可变形卷积建模边界，轻量级适配器通过结构重参数化降低推理延迟。
AI.result: 在多个生物医学数据集上显著超越基线方法，比原始SAM2提高19.66%的准确率，计算成本比重型医学SAM适应方法减少87%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了准确性和效率之间的优异平衡，为生物医学图像分割提供了一个有效的解决方案。

title: STALE: Can LLM Agents Know When Their Memories Are No Longer Valid?
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly expected to maintain coherent, long-term personalized memory, yet current benchmarks primarily measure static fact retrieval, overlooking the ability to revise stored beliefs when new evidence emerges. We identify a critical and underexplored failure mode, Implicit Conflict: a later observation invalidates an earlier memory without explicit negation, requiring contextual inference and commonsense reasoning to detect. To rigorously evaluate this capability, we introduce STALE, a benchmark of 400 expert-validated conflict scenarios (1,200 evaluation queries across three probing dimensions) spanning over 100 everyday topics with contexts up to 150K tokens. We propose a three-dimensional probing framework that tests State Resolution (detecting that a prior belief is outdated), Premise Resistance (rejecting queries that falsely presuppose a stale state), and Implicit Policy Adaptation (proactively applying updated states in downstream behavior). A systematic evaluation of frontier LLMs and specialized memory frameworks reveals a pervasive gap between retrieving updated evidence and acting on it, with even the best evaluated model achieving only 55.2% overall accuracy. Models often accept outdated assumptions embedded in a user's query, and they struggle to recognize when a change in one aspect of the user's state should invalidate related memories. To establish an initial baseline for state-aware memory, we further present CUPMem, a prototype that strengthens write-time revision through structured state consolidation and propagation-aware search, suggesting that explicit state adjudication is a promising direction for robust agentic memory.

AI.tldr: 本研究揭示了大型语言模型代理在处理隐性冲突记忆更新时存在显著不足，并提出了STALE基准测试和CUPMem解决方案。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM代理的个性化记忆测试主要关注静态事实检索，忽略了当新证据出现时修改已有信念的能力。研究发现存在一个关键且未被充分探索的失败模式——隐性冲突，即后续观察在未显式否定的情况下使早期记忆失效。
AI.method: 研究团队设计了STALE基准测试，包含400个专家验证的冲突场景（1200个评估查询），涵盖100多个日常主题，上下文长度达15万token。提出了三维探测框架：状态解决、前提抵抗和隐性策略适应。同时开发CUPMem原型系统，通过结构化状态整合和感知传播搜索来强化写入时修订。
AI.result: 系统性评估显示，前沿LLM和专业内存框架在检索更新证据与据此行动之间存在普遍鸿沟，最佳模型的整体准确率仅为55.2%。模型常接受用户查询中过时的假设，且难以识别一个方面状态变化应使相关记忆失效的情况。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明显式状态裁决是实现强大代理记忆的有前景方向。CUPMem原型为状态感知记忆建立了初步基线，通过明确的状态管理和更新机制来改善长期个性化记忆的一致性和准确性。

title: iPhoneBlur: A Difficulty-Stratified Benchmark for Consumer Device Motion Deblurring
summary: Motion blur restoration on consumer mobile devices is typically evaluated using aggregate metrics that obscure performance variation across blur difficulty, masking model behavior under real deployment conditions. This work introduces iPhoneBlur, a difficulty-stratified benchmark of 7,400 image pairs synthesized from high-framerate iPhone 17 Pro videos captured in diverse real-world scenarios. Samples are partitioned into Easy, Medium, and Hard categories through PSNR-guided adaptive temporal windowing, with stratification validated by monotonic 2.2x increase in optical flow magnitude across tiers. Each sample includes comprehensive metadata enabling investigation of ISP-aware and difficulty-adaptive restoration strategies. Spectral analysis confirms synthesized blur exhibits high-frequency suppression patterns consistent with authentic motion degradation. Evaluation of six architectures reveals consistent 7-9 dB performance degradation from Easy to Hard subsets, a substantial gap entirely hidden by aggregate reporting. The benchmark further exposes a domain gap between professional and consumer cameras which targeted fine-tuning substantially recovers. By coupling difficulty stratification with deployment-critical metadata, iPhoneBlur enables systematic assessment of model reliability and failure modes for resource-constrained edge systems.

AI.tldr: iPhoneBlur是一个针对消费级移动设备的运动模糊恢复基准数据集，包含7400个难度分层的图像对，揭示了真实部署条件下的模型性能变化。
AI.motivation: 现有的运动模糊恢复评估使用聚合指标，掩盖了不同模糊难度下的性能变化，无法反映真实部署条件下的模型行为。
AI.method: 通过iPhone 17 Pro高帧率视频合成7400个图像对，使用PSNR引导的自适应时间窗口将样本分为Easy、Medium、Hard三个难度分层，并通过光流幅度验证分层效果。
AI.result: 评估显示从Easy到Hard子集性能下降7-9dB，专业相机与消费相机之间存在域差异，通过针对性微调可显著恢复性能。
AI.conclusion: iPhoneBlur通过难度分层和部署关键元数据，为资源受限的边缘系统提供了模型可靠性和失败模式的系统评估框架。

title: Efficient Pre-Training with Token Superposition
summary: Pre-training of Large Language Models is often prohibitively expensive and inefficient at scale, requiring complex and invasive modifications in order to achieve high data throughput. In this work, we present Token-Superposition Training (TST), a simple drop-in method that significantly improves the data throughput per FLOPs during pre-training without modifying the parallelism, optimizer, tokenizer, data, or model architecture. TST is done in two phases: (i) A highly efficient superposition phase where we combine many contiguous tokens into one bag and train using a multi-hot cross-entropy (MCE) objective, and (ii) a recovery phase where we revert back to standard training. We extensively evaluate TST on the scale of 270M and 600M parameters and validate on 3B and a 10B A1B mixture of experts model, demonstrating that it is highly robust in different settings. Ultimately, TST consistently outperforms baseline loss and downstream evaluations, and under equal-loss settings, TST yields up to a 2.5x reduction in total pre-training time at the 10B A1B scale.

AI.tldr: Token-Superposition Training (TST) 是一种简单高效的预训练方法，在不修改模型架构的情况下将多个token叠加训练，在同等损失下可将预训练时间减少2.5倍。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的预训练成本极高且效率低下，传统方法需要复杂且侵入性的修改才能实现高数据吞吐量。
AI.method: TST分为两个阶段：(i)高效率叠加阶段，将多个连续token合并为一个token bag，使用多热点交叉熵目标训练；(ii)恢复阶段，回到标准训练方式。该方法无需修改并行策略、优化器、分词器、数据或模型架构。
AI.result: 在270M、600M参数规模上广泛评估，并在3B和10B A1B混合专家模型上验证。TST在基准损失和下游评估中持续优于基线，在同等损失设置下，10B A1B规模下预训练时间减少高达2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: TST是一种简单实用的预训练加速方法，在不同设置下具有高度鲁棒性，能够显著提升预训练效率，为大规模语言模型训练提供了新的思路。

title: 4DThinker: Thinking with 4D Imagery for Dynamic Spatial Understanding
summary: Dynamic spatial reasoning from monocular video is essential for bridging visual intelligence and the physical world, yet remains challenging for vision-language models (VLMs). Prior approaches either verbalize spatial-temporal reasoning entirely as text, which is inherently verbose and imprecise for complex dynamics, or rely on external geometric modules that increase inference complexity without fostering intrinsic model capability. In this paper, we present 4DThinker, the first framework that enables VLMs to "think with 4D" through dynamic latent mental imagery, i.e., internally simulating how scenes evolve within the continuous hidden space. Specifically, we first introduce a scalable, annotation-free data generation pipeline that synthesizes 4D reasoning data from raw videos. We then propose Dynamic-Imagery Fine-Tuning (DIFT), which jointly supervises textual tokens and 4D latents to ground the model in dynamic visual semantics. Building on this, 4D Reinforcement Learning (4DRL) further tackles complex reasoning tasks via outcome-based rewards, restricting policy gradients to text tokens to ensure stable optimization. Extensive experiments across multiple dynamic spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that 4DThinker consistently outperforms strong baselines and offers a new perspective toward 4D reasoning in VLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhangquanchen/4DThinker.

AI.tldr: 4DThinker是一个让视觉语言模型通过4D潜在心理图像进行动态空间推理的框架，通过无标签数据生成、动态图像微调和强化学习实现了对复杂动态场景的内在推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在从单目视频进行动态空间推理方面存在局限性：要么将时空推理完全转化为文本表示（冗长且不精确），要么依赖外部几何模块（增加推理复杂度且不培养模型内在能力）。
AI.method: 提出4DThinker框架：1) 设计可扩展的无标签数据生成管道，从原始视频合成4D推理数据；2) 提出动态图像微调(DIFT)，联合监督文本标记和4D潜在表示；3) 开发4D强化学习(4DRL)，通过基于结果的奖励处理复杂推理任务。
AI.result: 在多个动态空间推理基准测试中，4DThinker持续超越强基线模型，为视觉语言模型的4D推理提供了新的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 4DThinker首次实现了视觉语言模型的

title: Continuous Latent Diffusion Language Model
comment: 99 pages, 31 figures, 9 tables. Project page: https://hongcanguo.github.io/Cola-DLM/
summary: Large language models have achieved remarkable success under the autoregressive paradigm, yet high-quality text generation need not be tied to a fixed left-to-right order. Existing alternatives still struggle to jointly achieve generation efficiency, scalable representation learning, and effective global semantic modeling. We propose Cola DLM, a hierarchical latent diffusion language model that frames text generation through hierarchical information decomposition. Cola DLM first learns a stable text-to-latent mapping with a Text VAE, then models a global semantic prior in continuous latent space with a block-causal DiT, and finally generates text through conditional decoding. From a unified Markov-path perspective, its diffusion process performs latent prior transport rather than token-level observation recovery, thereby separating global semantic organization from local textual realization. This design yields a more flexible non-autoregressive inductive bias, supports semantic compression and prior fitting in continuous space, and naturally extends to other continuous modalities. Through experiments spanning 4 research questions, 8 benchmarks, strictly matched ~2B-parameter autoregressive and LLaDA baselines, and scaling curves up to about 2000 EFLOPs, we identify an effective overall configuration of Cola DLM and verify its strong scaling behavior for text generation. Taken together, the results establish hierarchical continuous latent prior modeling as a principled alternative to strictly token-level language modeling, where generation quality and scaling behavior may better reflect model capability than likelihood, while also suggesting a concrete path toward unified modeling across discrete text and continuous modalities.

AI.tldr: Cola DLM是一种分层潜在扩散语言模型，通过分层信息分解将文本生成转化为连续潜在空间的建模，实现了生成效率、可扩展表示学习和有效全局语义建模的统一。
AI.motivation: 自回归语言模型虽然取得了成功，但固定从左到右的生成顺序限制了高质量文本生成的灵活性。现有替代方案难以同时实现生成效率、可扩展表示学习和有效的全局语义建模。
AI.method: Cola DLM采用三层架构：首先使用Text VAE学习稳定的文本到潜在表示映射，然后在连续潜在空间中用块因果DiT建模全局语义先验，最后通过条件解码生成文本。从统一马尔可夫路径视角，其扩散过程执行潜在先验传输而非令牌级观测恢复。
AI.result: 通过4个研究问题、8个基准测试、严格匹配约20亿参数的自回归和LLaDA基线以及扩展到约2000 EFLOPs的扩展曲线实验，验证了Cola DLM的有效配置和文本生成的强扩展性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层连续潜在先验建模是令牌级语言建模的 principled 替代方案，生成质量和扩展行为可能比似然更能反映模型能力，同时为离散文本和连续模态的统一建模提供了具体路径。

title: Neuromorphic visual attention for Sign-language recognition on SpiNNaker
summary: Sign-language recognition has achieved substantial gains in classification accuracy in recent years; however, the latency and power requirements of most existing methods limit their suitability for real-time deployment. Neuromorphic sensing and processing offer an alternative paradigm based on sparse, event-driven computation that supports low-latency and energy-efficient perception. In this work, we introduce an end-to-end neuromorphic architecture for American Sign Language (ASL) fingerspelling recognition that integrates a spiking visual attention mechanism for online region-of-interest extraction with a compact spiking neural network deployed on the SpiNNaker neuromorphic platform. We benchmark the proposed system against two datasets: a synthetically generated event-based version of the Sign Language MNIST dataset and a natively recorded ASL-DVS dataset, whilst providing a comprehensive overview of Sign-language recognition and related work. This work yields competitive performance in simulation (92.27%) and comparable performance on neuromorphic hardware deployment (83.1%), while achieving the most energy-efficient architecture (0.565 mW) and low latency (3 ms) across all benchmarked approaches. Despite its compact design, the system demonstrates the suitability of task-dependent visual attention applications for edge deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经形态计算的端到端美国手语字母识别系统，通过脉冲视觉注意力机制和紧凑的脉冲神经网络，在保证识别准确率的同时实现了极低的功耗和延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有的手语识别方法虽然分类准确率较高，但在延迟和功耗方面限制了其实时部署的可行性。神经形态传感和处理基于稀疏事件驱动计算，为低延迟、高能效的感知提供了新的技术路径。
AI.method: 提出集成脉冲视觉注意力机制和紧凑脉冲神经网络的端到端神经形态架构。该系统结合在线感兴趣区域提取功能，并在SpiNNaker神经形态平台上部署。使用Sign Language MNIST和ASL-DVS两个数据集进行评估。
AI.result: 在仿真环境中达到92.27%的识别准确率，神经形态硬件部署达到83.1%的准确率。整个系统功耗仅为0.565 mW，延迟为3 ms，是所有基准测试方法中最节能、低延迟的方案。
AI.conclusion: 尽管设计紧凑，该系统证明了任务依赖的视觉注意力应用在边缘部署中的适用性，为实时手语识别提供了一种高效可行的技术方案。

title: Long Context Pre-Training with Lighthouse Attention
summary: Training causal transformers at extreme sequence lengths is bottlenecked by the quadratic time and memory of scaled dot-product attention (SDPA). In this work, we propose Lighthouse Attention, a training-only symmetrical selection-based hierarchical attention algorithm that wraps around ordinary SDPA and can be easily removed towards the end of the training. Our hierarchical selection is also gradient-free, which exempts us from dealing with a complicated and potentially inefficient backward pass kernel. Our contribution is three-fold: (i) A subquadratic hierarchical pre- and post-processing step that does adaptive compression and decompression of the sequence. (ii) A symmetrical compression strategy that pools queries, keys and values at the same time, while preserving left-to-right causality, which greatly improves parallelism. (iii) A two stage training approach which we pre-train for the majority of the time with Lighthouse Attention and recover a full attention model at the end with a short training. We run preliminary small scale LLM pre-training experiments that show the effectiveness of our method compared to full attention training with all other settings matched, where we achieve a faster total training time and lower final loss after the recovery phase. Full code is available at: https://github.com/ighoshsubho/lighthouse-attention

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lighthouse Attention，一种训练专用的对称选择式分层注意力算法，通过自适应压缩和解压缩序列来降低注意力的计算复杂度，实现更快的训练速度和更低的最终损失。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在极长序列训练时面临缩放点积注意力(SDPA)的二次时间和内存复杂度瓶颈，限制了训练效率和序列长度处理能力。
